summary: Verified ADR 0224 from the latest-origin-main integration candidate by proving validated source commit `14143f58` through the private Gitea branch gate, publishing that exact tree into the host-trusted private Gitea `main` as snapshot `9f988bf5`, replaying the server-resident ansible-pull service on proxmox_florin, and re-verifying the ADR 0226 host control-loop timer, path trigger, and manual one-shot service without any controller-side mutate loop.

verification.observed: Candidate commit `14143f58d6ef38dbfb709d74ff315531c6900571` passed the focused local integration suite: `uv run --with pytest --with jinja2 --with jsonschema pytest -q tests/test_proxmox_host_control_loops_role.py tests/test_server_resident_reconciliation.py tests/test_policy_checks.py tests/test_command_catalog.py tests/test_parallel_check.py tests/test_promotion_pipeline.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_release_manager.py tests/test_canonical_truth.py tests/test_docs_site.py tests/test_validate_repo_cache.py` returned `68 passed in 7.45s`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards yaml json role-argument-specs ansible-syntax data-models` passed, `scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `scripts/generate_adr_index.py --check`, `scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, `scripts/platform_manifest.py --check`, `scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check`, and `git diff --check` all passed, and `make pre-push-gate` completed successfully with `alert-rule-validation`, `ansible-lint`, `ansible-syntax`, `artifact-secret-scan`, `dependency-direction`, `dependency-graph`, `integration-tests`, `packer-validate`, `policy-validation`, `schema-validation`, `security-scan`, `service-completeness`, `tofu-validate`, `type-check`, and `yaml-lint`.

Private Gitea accepted branch head `14143f58d6ef38dbfb709d74ff315531c6900571`; workflow run `66` (API id `70`) finished with `status: completed` and `conclusion: success`, and job `88` named `validate` ran on runner `docker-build-lv3` from `2026-03-28T21:11:34Z` through `2026-03-28T21:11:37Z`.

The host-trusted private Gitea `main` fast-forwarded from `c3ef5f172c7ec178a692b0ee772d2d1349096ab5` to snapshot `9f988bf58f6f02c4add3c6292c65fbed929edac9` published for source commit `14143f58d6ef38dbfb709d74ff315531c6900571`; workflow run `67` (API id `71`) finished with `status: completed` and `conclusion: success`, and job `89` named `validate` ran on runner `docker-build-lv3` from `2026-03-28T21:12:30Z` through `2026-03-28T21:12:34Z`.

On `2026-03-28T21:12:55Z`, `sudo systemctl start lv3-server-resident-reconciliation.service` completed successfully on `proxmox_florin`; `/srv/proxmox_florin_server` checked out `9f988bf58f6f02c4add3c6292c65fbed929edac9`, the working tree stayed clean, and `/var/lib/lv3/server-resident-reconciliation/receipts/latest.json` recorded `status: ok`, `exit_code: 0`, `duration_seconds: 12`, `repo_branch: main`, `started_at: 2026-03-28T21:12:55Z`, `finished_at: 2026-03-28T21:13:07Z`, and `source_commit: 9f988bf58f6f02c4add3c6292c65fbed929edac9`.

`lv3-server-resident-reconciliation.timer` remained `ActiveState=active SubState=waiting` with `LastTriggerUSec=Sat 2026-03-28 22:01:41 CET` and `NextElapseUSecRealtime=Sat 2026-03-28 22:32:01 CET`, while `lv3-server-resident-reconciliation.service` ended `Result=success ExecMainStatus=0 ActiveState=inactive SubState=dead` after the exact-main replay.

verification.check: Path-triggered host control-loop replay after exact-main publication
verification.observed: Writing `ws-0224-path-20260328T211342Z` to `/var/lib/lv3-host-control-loops/requests/reconcile.request` was consumed immediately; `/var/lib/lv3-host-control-loops/status/latest.json` recorded `trigger: path_request` at `2026-03-28T21:13:42Z` with `history_path: /var/lib/lv3-host-control-loops/runs/20260328T211342Z.json`.

verification.check: Manual one-shot host control-loop replay after exact-main publication
verification.observed: `sudo systemctl start lv3-host-control-loop-reconcile.service` immediately after the path-triggered replay recorded `trigger: scheduled_or_manual` at `2026-03-28T21:13:52Z` with `history_path: /var/lib/lv3-host-control-loops/runs/20260328T211352Z.json`; the service finished `Result=success ExecMainStatus=0 ActiveState=inactive SubState=dead`, and both the timer and path units remained `ActiveState=active SubState=waiting`.

notes: ADR 0226 first became true earlier on platform version `0.130.38`; this ADR 0224 receipt records the later exact-main proof that the combined server-resident control model is now true on platform version `0.130.42` and integrated into repository release `0.177.52`.

The exact-main host replay consumed private Gitea snapshot `9f988bf58f6f02c4add3c6292c65fbed929edac9` published from source commit `14143f58d6ef38dbfb709d74ff315531c6900571` because the host trusts the private Gitea repository rather than GitHub directly.

Any same-turn branch edits after the exact-main replay are ADR-local metadata, release-truth, and receipt surfaces only; no additional live automation surfaces changed after the verified `ansible-pull` plus host-control-loop proof above.
